nodes.name: .bk.yaml
nodes.summary: Minimal Buildkite CLI configuration file specifying the selected organization for the `bk` command-line tool.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion rules, omitting target directories, test data, documentation, and large non-production files to keep Docker builds fast and images small.

nodes.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
nodes.summary: Pre-commit hook configuration running Cargo fmt and Clippy checks, typo detection, and TOML formatting before each commit.

nodes.name: .typos.toml
nodes.summary: Typos spell-checker configuration with an extensive allowlist of domain-specific terms (SQL keywords, Rust identifiers, protocol names) that would otherwise be flagged as typos.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive coding agent instructions covering project overview, coding style, build/run/test workflows, PR labeling, connector development, and repo skill plugins for AI coding assistants.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Coding agent instructions for Claude AI covering project overview, build/test commands, PR submission labels, and repo skill plugins — mirrors AGENTS.md content.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Short contributing guide directing contributors to sign the CLA and read the full developer guide before submitting changes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Rust workspace manifest listing all crate members, shared workspace dependencies with pinned versions, lint rules (clippy and rustdoc), and multiple build profiles (dev, release, ci-dev, ci-sim, production).
nodes.languageNotes: Defines a Cargo workspace with ~80 member crates and centralized [workspace.dependencies] to enforce version consistency across the monorepo.

nodes.name: Makefile.toml
nodes.summary: cargo-make task file defining all risedev developer commands: build, test, check, deploy (dev cluster), SQL shell, simulation tests, SLT runners, benchmarks, and release helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses cargo-make TOML task syntax with 100+ tasks; `risedev` is a thin wrapper around `cargo make`.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project README for RisingWave, covering the event-streaming database positioning, quick-start guide, architecture overview (ingest, process, serve, Iceberg store), use cases, design decisions, deployment options, and community links.

nodes.name: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security policy specifying supported versions and instructions for reporting vulnerabilities responsibly to the RisingWave Labs security team.

nodes.name: clippy.toml
nodes.summary: Clippy linter configuration file setting project-wide lint rules and thresholds such as maximum function complexity and cognitive complexity limits.

nodes.name: codecov.yml
nodes.summary: Codecov configuration controlling coverage targets, patch coverage thresholds, ignored paths (tests, generated code), and PR comment behavior.

nodes.name: licenserc.toml
nodes.summary: License header compliance configuration specifying the Apache-2.0 SPDX identifier for Rust, Python, and YAML files while listing ignored paths.

nodes.name: risedev.yml
nodes.summary: RiseDev developer environment configuration defining service component profiles (MinIO, Kafka, etcd, Prometheus, Grafana, etc.) and templates for local cluster setups used by `risedev dev`.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines ~20+ named profiles and templates used by the risedev tooling to spin up local multi-component development clusters.

nodes.name: rustfmt.toml
nodes.summary: Rust code formatter configuration enforcing project style rules such as import grouping, max line width, trailing commas, and edition settings.

nodes.name: tomlfmt.toml
nodes.summary: TOML formatter configuration controlling indentation, array formatting, and sorting rules for `taplo` formatter.
